other_observers: Sean Walters and other Walters family members; Sean Walters reported finding this bird on 9/12/2012. Other observers include Cole Wild, Rachel Hopper.
description: Small female hummingbird dark green above, white below, lacking any buff or rufous on flanks or in the tail. Tail pail green basally, with black subterminal band, tipped white on outer 3 rectrices. Bill black, short and straight. Black eye with a white spot behind it. Tail extends beyond wings at rest.Behaviors: Resting on tree limb and visiting a feeder.Call: soft, single note, somewhat warbler-like, given repeatedly at rest.Plumage: adult?
photographer: Photographer: N Komar, N Komar, N Komar
